en.name: Tic-Tac-Toe
en.desc: The simplest yet timeless game! Get three Xs or Os in a row to win. Play against a friend or the AI. Perfect for quick strategic thinking!
en.description: Tic-Tac-Toe is the classic paper-and-pencil game that has taught generations about strategy! Two players take turns marking X and O on a 3×3 grid, racing to get three in a row. Despite its simple rules, the game contains deep strategic elements—forks, blocks, and optimal play patterns. It's the perfect introduction to competitive strategy games and a great way to practice tactical thinking!
en.objectives: Be the first player to place three of your marks (X or O) in a horizontal, vertical, or diagonal row on the 3×3 grid. Block your opponent's winning attempts while setting up your own victory. Master the optimal strategies to never lose!
en.howToPlay: Players take turns placing X or O in empty cells. First to get three in a row (horizontally, vertically, or diagonally) wins. If all cells fill with no winner, it's a draw.

rules.controls: Click on any empty cell to place your mark. X always goes first. The game alternates between players until someone wins or the grid is full.
mechanics: X always makes the first move
Three in a row wins the game
Full grid with no winner is a draw
features: Two-Player Mode - Play with a friend
Quick Games - Under a minute each

tips: Always take the center if available
Create "forks" - two winning threats at once
Corners are more valuable than edges

faq.question: What's the best first move?
faq.answer: The center is the strongest opening because it's part of 4 winning lines. If the center is taken, any corner is equally good. Edges are the weakest opening moves.

faq.question: Can Tic-Tac-Toe always be won?
faq.answer: With perfect play from both players, Tic-Tac-Toe always ends in a draw. However, most casual players make mistakes that can be exploited!

faq.question: What is a fork in Tic-Tac-Toe?
faq.answer: A fork is when you create two winning threats simultaneously. Since your opponent can only block one, you're guaranteed to win on your next move.

faq.question: How many possible games of Tic-Tac-Toe exist?
faq.answer: There are 255,168 possible games of Tic-Tac-Toe, but only 26,830 unique board positions when accounting for rotations and reflections.

zh.name: 井字棋
zh.desc: 最简单却永恒的游戏！将三个X或O连成一线获胜。与朋友或AI对战。快速战略思维的完美选择！
zh.description: 井字棋是教会几代人策略的经典纸笔游戏！两名玩家轮流在3×3网格上标记X和O，竞相连成三个。尽管规则简单，游戏包含深刻的战略元素——叉子、阻挡和最佳玩法模式。这是竞技策略游戏的完美入门，也是练习战术思维的好方法！
zh.objectives: 成为第一个在3×3网格的水平、垂直或对角线上放置三个标记（X或O）的玩家。阻止对手的获胜尝试，同时设置自己的胜利。掌握最佳策略永远不输！
zh.howToPlay: 玩家轮流在空格中放置X或O。首先连成三个（水平、垂直或对角线）的获胜。如果所有格都填满但没有获胜者，就是平局。

rules.controls: 点击任何空格放置你的标记。X总是先走。游戏在玩家之间交替，直到有人获胜或网格填满。
mechanics: 网格填满无获胜者为平局
features: 双人对战模式 - 与朋友一起玩
快速游戏 - 每局不到一分钟
策略练习 - 学习最佳玩法

tips: 如果可能，总是占据中心
立即阻止对手的获胜动作
创造"叉子"——同时两个获胜威胁

faq.question: 最佳的第一步是什么？
faq.answer: 中心是最强的开局，因为它是4条获胜线的一部分。如果中心被占，任何角都同样好。边是最弱的开局。

faq.question: 井字棋总是能赢吗？
faq.answer: 如果双方都完美发挥，井字棋总是以平局结束。但是，大多数休闲玩家会犯错，这些错误可以被利用！

faq.question: 井字棋中的叉子是什么？
faq.answer: 叉子是你同时创造两个获胜威胁。因为你的对手只能阻挡一个，你保证在下一步获胜。

faq.question: 井字棋有多少种可能的对局？
faq.answer: 井字棋有255,168种可能的对局，但考虑到旋转和反射，只有26,830个独特的棋盘位置。
